2290390.name: Guilty Parade: Episode 4
2290390.description:
The fourth episode of the interactive visual novel with Point & Click elements Guilty Parade.

Nemo decides to take fate into his own hands and acts decisively. Where will his efforts to find the truth lead? Which side is he on? Will Nemo be able to learn more about his past and understand what person he is? What side will he choose to fight for?

What awaits you in the new episode:

  • The long-awaited choice of the side of the military conflict

  • Participation in intrigues

  • Solving old mysteries and unexpected revelations

  • New characters who will try to convince you of their own truth

Episodes 1-3 are required to run the game.

Episode 4 consists of two main routes: The Underside of the Future and The Underside of the Past.
